description_long: This object is a wooden bar counter setup, featuring a dark wood finish with visible grain and some surface wear. The main structure consists of three walls forming a partial enclosure, with a bar counter running along the front and several wooden stools arranged for seating. Behind the counter, there is a shelving unit stocked with bottles, mugs, and containers, as well as a barrel and framed pictures on the walls. The floor is made of wooden planks, and the entrance is marked by swinging saloon-style doors. The overall design evokes a rustic, old-fashioned bar or saloon environment, with a focus on hospitality and social gathering.
description: A rustic wooden bar counter with stools, shelving, and saloon-style doors, designed for a classic hospitality setting.
description_view_0: A plain wooden wall with visible grain and some stains, showing the exterior of the bar structure.
description_view_1: The side wall of the bar with a partial view of the interior, including the shelving and some stools visible through the entrance.
description_view_2: The main front view of the bar, displaying the counter, stools, shelving with bottles, mugs, and wall decorations.
description_view_3: An angled view showing the bar counter, stools, shelving, and the swinging saloon doors at the entrance.
